title: Elaeoselinum gummiferum

intro: Elaeoselinum gummiferum, also known as gum gilga or gilga, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Elaeoselinum gummiferum include essential oils, flavonoids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Elaeoselinum gummiferum is often prepared as a gum resin, a tincture, or a decoction, which are used to treat various health issues.
